patch.value: Migrate extension terminology to package-first docs and UX
Audit command help, docs, skills, examples, telemetry naming, and error guidance so users see packages first while legacy extension wording remains clear for compatibility.
Top-level help and docs consistently prefer packages; legacy extension command is documented as compatibility; docs-skills and static quality gates pass.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Plan item created because this implementation intentionally keeps internals/backward compatibility on extension terminology while exposing package-first user commands.
